69:     override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
70:         super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
71: 
72:         // Initialize engines
73:         ttsEngine = StreamingTTSManager(this) { intent ->
74:             if (intent != null) {
75:                 startActivity(intent)
76:             }
77:         }
78: 
79:         ttsEngine.onSpeakingStateChanged = { isSpeaking ->
80:             if (isSpeaking) {
81:                 audioRecorderHelper.isMuted = true
82:             } else {
83:                 // When TTS stops speaking, wait a short cooldown (e.g. 400ms) before unmuting the recorder.
84:                 // This prevents capturing room reverberations or the very end of the speaker's audio.
85:                 lifecycleScope.launch {
86:                     kotlinx.coroutines.delay(400)
87:                     // Check if TTS didn't start speaking again during this delay
88:                     if (!ttsEngine.isSpeaking()) {
89:                         audioRecorderHelper.isMuted = false
90:                     }
91:                 }
92:             }
93:         }
94: 
95:         translationEngine = TranslationEngine(this) { partialToken, ttft ->
96:             runOnUiThread {
97:                 if (ttft != null) {
98:                     latencyText.value = "Delay: ${ttft}ms"
99:                     if (rawTranslationBuffer.isNotEmpty()) {
100:                         rawTranslationBuffer.append(" ")
101:                     }
102:                 }
103: 
104:                 rawTranslationBuffer.append(partialToken)
105:                 
106:                 var cleanText = rawTranslationBuffer.toString()
107:                 cleanText = cleanText.replace(Regex("<[^>]*>"), "")
108:                     .replace("end_of_turn", "").replace("start_of_turn", "")
109:                     .replace("eos", "").replace("model", "").replace("user", "")
110:                     .replace("thought", "").replace("*", "")
111:                 cleanText = cleanText.replace(Regex("<[^>]*$"), "")
112:                     .replace(Regex("end_[^ ]*$"), "").replace(Regex("start_[^ ]*$"), "")
113:                 val finalText = cleanText.trim()
114: 
115:                 if (finalText.isNotEmpty()) {
116:                     translatedText.value = finalText
117:                 }
118:                 
119:                 var cleanPartial = partialToken.replace(Regex("<[^>]*>"), "")
120:                     .replace("end_of_turn", "").replace("start_of_turn", "")
121:                     .replace("eos", "").replace("model", "").replace("user", "")
122:                     .replace("thought", "").replace("*", "")
123:                 
124:                 if (cleanPartial.isNotEmpty()) {
125:                     ttsEngine.processToken(cleanPartial)
126:                 }
127:             }
128:         }
129: 
130:         audioRecorderHelper = AudioRecorderHelper()
131: 
132:         // Initialize Download Manager
133:         downloadManager = ModelDownloadManager(this)
134:         isModelReady.value = downloadManager.isModelDownloaded()
135: 
136:         // Request permissions
137:         if (ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(this, Manifest.permission.RECORD_AUDIO) != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED) {
138:             requestPermissionLauncher.launch(Manifest.permission.RECORD_AUDIO)
139:         }
140: 
141:         setContent {
142:             MaterialTheme(colorScheme = darkColorScheme()) {
143:                 Surface(
144:                     modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
145:                     color = Color(0xFF121212)
146:                 ) {
147:                     if (isModelReady.value) {
148:                         AuraVoiceApp()
149:                     } else {
150:                         SetupScreen()
151:                     }
152:                 }
153:             }
154:         }
155: 
156:         // Do NOT initialize engine at startup — load lazily on first mic press
157:         // This prevents OOM from loading a 2.5GB model while other apps use RAM
158:     }

160:     @Composable
161:     fun SetupScreen() {
162:         val coroutineScope = rememberCoroutineScope()
163:         
164:         Column(
165:             modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize().padding(32.dp),
166:             horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
167:             verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center

169:             Text("AuraVoice Setup", fontSize = 28.sp, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = Color.White)
170:             Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))

173:                 color = Color.LightGray,
174:                 fontSize = 16.sp
175:             )
176:             Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(32.dp))
177:             
178:             if (isDownloading.value) {

187:             } else {

198:                                         // Initialize engine after download
199:                                         coroutineScope.launch {
200:                                             translationEngine.initialize(downloadManager.getModelAbsolutePath())
201:                                         }
202:                                     } else {
203:                                         Toast.makeText(this@MainActivity, "Download Failed", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()
204:                                     }
205:                                 }
206:                             )
207:                         }
208:                     },
209:                     colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(containerColor = Color(0xFFBB86FC))
210:                 ) {
211:                     Text("Download Gemma Model (~2.5GB)", color = Color.Black)
212:                 }
213:             }
214:         }
215:     }

304: 
305:             if (engineLoading.value) {

308:                     Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
309:                     Text("Loading model…", color = Color.Gray, fontSize = 14.sp)
310:                 }

384:     @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
385:     @Composable
386:     fun LanguageDropdown(label: String, selected: String, onSelectionChanged: (String) -> Unit) {
387:         var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
388: 
389:         ExposedDropdownMenuBox(
390:             expanded = expanded,
391:             onExpandedChange = { expanded = !expanded }
392:         ) {
393:             OutlinedTextField(
394:                 value = selected,
395:                 onValueChange = {},
396:                 readOnly = true,
397:                 label = { Text(label, color = Color.Gray) },
398:                 trailingIcon = { ExposedDropdownMenuDefaults.TrailingIcon(expanded = expanded) },
399:                 colors = ExposedDropdownMenuDefaults.outlinedTextFieldColors(
400:                     focusedBorderColor = Color(0xFFBB86FC),
401:                     unfocusedBorderColor = Color.DarkGray,
402:                     focusedTextColor = Color.White,
403:                     unfocusedTextColor = Color.White
404:                 ),
405:                 modifier = Modifier.menuAnchor().width(130.dp)
406:             )
407:             ExposedDropdownMenu(
408:                 expanded = expanded,
409:                 onDismissRequest = { expanded = false }
410:             ) {
411:                 languages.forEach { selectionOption ->
412:                     DropdownMenuItem(
413:                         text = { Text(selectionOption) },
414:                         onClick = {
415:                             onSelectionChanged(selectionOption)
416:                             expanded = false
417:                         }
418:                     )
419:                 }
420:             }
421:         }
422:     }
423: 
424:     @Composable
425:     fun MicrophoneButton(isRecording: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit) {
426:         val infiniteTransition = rememberInfiniteTransition()
427:         val scale by infiniteTransition.animateFloat(
428:             initialValue = 1f,
429:             targetValue = if (isRecording) 1.2f else 1f,
430:             animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
431:                 animation = tween(800, easing = FastOutSlowInEasing),
432:                 repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
433:             )
434:         )
435: 
436:         Box(
437:             modifier = Modifier
438:                 .size(80.dp)
439:                 .scale(scale)
440:                 .clip(CircleShape)
441:                 .background(if (isRecording) Color(0xFFCF6679) else Color(0xFFBB86FC))
442:                 .clickable { onClick() },
443:             contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
444:         ) {
445:             Text(
446:                 text = if (isRecording) "⬛" else "🎙",
447:                 fontSize = 32.sp,
448:                 color = Color.White
449:             )
450:         }
451:     }
